headline: Immigration Detention Deaths Reach 45 in Single Year
context: SUHAKAM documented 45 deaths in immigration detention centres in 2025 citing overcrowding and inadequate medical care.

cards.big: 45 deaths in immigration detention documented by SUHAKAM in 2025
cards.sub: Overcrowding at 180% capacity and inadequate healthcare are primary factors

cards.big: Centres hold 18,500 detainees against combined capacity of 10,200
cards.sub: Semenyih facility designed for 1,200 houses 2,800 detainees

cards.big: Only 12 medical officers serve all 14 detention centres nationwide
cards.sub: 1 doctor per 1,540 detainees versus WHO recommendation of 1 per 300

cards.big: UNHCR access restricted on 28 occasions in 2025
cards.sub: Agency could not verify conditions or identify persons needing protection

cards.big: Detention deaths test whether immigration enforcement operates within human rights standards
45 immigration detention deaths in one year. Custody deaths demand independent investigation, not internal review.
